languages.text: "Мастер Равор, курс с орбиты в пустоту. Мне нужно поразмыслить".
"Master Ravor, course from orbit into the void. I must give this some thought."
languages.original_text: "Мастер Равор, курс с орбиты в пустоту. Мне нужно поразмыслить".

traits.locale_text: "Master Ravor, course from orbit into the void. I must give this some thought."
"Master Ravor, course from orbit into the void. I must give this some thought."
"Master Ravor, course from orbit into the void. I must give this some thought."
"Master Ravor, course from orbit into the void. I must give this some thought."

languages.text: 「ラヴォー師匠、軌道から宇宙空間にコースを。考えなければならない」
languages.original_text: "Master Ravor, course from orbit into the void. I must give this some thought."

languages.text: "Üstat Ravor, yörüngeden uçsuza dönelim. Bu konuyu teferruatla düşünmeliyim."
languages.original_text: "Master Ravor, course from orbit into the void. I must give this some thought."

traits.locale_text: "Üstat Ravor, yörüngeden uçsuza dönelim. Bu konuyu teferruatla düşünmeliyim."

languages.text: “雷沃大师，从轨道驶向虚空……容我再考虑考虑。”
languages.original_text: "Master Ravor, course from orbit into the void. I must give this some thought."

traits.locale_text: “雷沃大师，从轨道驶向虚空……容我再考虑考虑。”

languages.text: "Meister Ravor, wir verlassen den Orbit und nehmen Kurs auf die Leere. Ich muss nachdenken."
languages.original_text: "Master Ravor, course from orbit into the void. I must give this some thought."

traits.locale_text: "Meister Ravor, wir verlassen den Orbit und nehmen Kurs auf die Leere. Ich muss nachdenken."

languages.text: « Maître Ravor, éloignez-nous de l'orbite de cette planète. J'ai besoin de réfléchir à la question. »
languages.original_text: "Master Ravor, course from orbit into the void. I must give this some thought."

traits.locale_text: « Maître Ravor, éloignez-nous de l'orbite de cette planète. J'ai besoin de réfléchir à la question. »

languages.text: «Maestro Ravor, saque la nave de la órbita al vacío. Debo pensarme esto».
languages.original_text: "Master Ravor, course from orbit into the void. I must give this some thought."

traits.locale_text: «Maestro Ravor, saque la nave de la órbita al vacío. Debo pensarme esto».
